`[RALPH] ✅ MISSION COMPLETE` ## Summary Implemented the **Add Contact Page** plan in full. This `testHubLaunch` repo is a plain static-HTML project (no `package.json`), so the `pnpm tsc`/`pnpm check`/IVR steps in `ralph.md` are the generic IVR-project template and don't apply — there's nothing for them to run against. Verified accordingly. **Implemented:** - `contact.html` — HTML5 page, `lang="en"`, UTF-8, viewport meta, `Contact — Hula`, `

Contact Us

`, a `
` with labeled Name (text), Email (email), Message (textarea rows=5) — all `required` — a "Send Message" submit button, a hidden `#success-msg`, and a minimal inline script that calls `preventDefault()`, shows the confirmation, and resets the form. - `contact.css` — box-sizing reset, flex-centered body, `main` max-width 480px, styled inputs/textarea (`font-family: inherit`), button + hover, green success message. **Tests / verification (Phase 3 + Acceptance Criteria):** - ✓ Structural validation via Python `html.parser`: all label `for`/`id` pairings, input types, `required` attrs, title, heading, meta, CSS link present; **no** external `
